info.title: Integration Tool Kit.
info.description:
This api allows all developers integrate to access control software. 
The documentation bellow shows all public api and it was auto-generated by Swagger (Swashbuckle in .Net 
see: https://github.com/domaindrivendev/Swashbuckle) based on OpenAPI Specification(see: https://github.com/OAI/OpenAPI-Specification).
The architectural approach is Restful and Json. Feel free for any suggestion or question about it contacting our support. 
Version: 3.40.0.0

get.summary: Returns a list of access log from a pointer to end (Auth roles: REPORT, ROLE_PLG_ACCESSLOG)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Represents a pointer to get it up log

WWW-Authenticate.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

get.summary: Returns a list of access log from a pointer to end by logType. (Auth roles: REPORT, ROLE_PLG_ACCESSLOG)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Represents a pointer to get it up log

parameters.name: logType
parameters.description: Type of the log, use 0 = Access, 1 = Register, or 2 = Access + Register

WWW-Authenticate.description: Authorization information is missing or invalid.

parameters.description: Represents a Year of access that ends the log

parameters.name: accessMonthTo
parameters.description: Represents a Month of access that ends the log

parameters.description: Represents a Day of access that ends the log

parameters.description: Type of the log, use 0 = Access, 1 = Register, 2 = Access + Register, or 3 = All

get.summary: Validate user logon and return a access token (Auth roles: LOGON)
get.description:
This action must be called to get a Bearer token. ALL api actions require a Bearer token. Each token has to
30 minutes of expiration time.
To call this action you need set the header 'Authorization: Nak eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1...'. The 'Nak' is
only used to logon and it do not necessary for others actions. In order to get a 'Nak' token,
contact our support team.

401.description: The user or password is invalid

AlternativeFingerprintType.description: Gets or sets the alternative fingerprint type

TechnologyType.description: Thecnology type of credential as Barcode, Proximity etc

DurationType.description: Type of duration when credential is associated

BlockingReason.description:
The reason o block when CredentialStatus is Blocked. if CredentialStatus set to Blocked this
property is required

ValidityBegin.description:
Initial datetime of credential. Is required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.

ValidityEnd.description:
Final datetime of credential. Is required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.

TimeCollectInSafe.description: Time to collect in safe at the end of validity. Format HH:mm

IsCredentialPublic.description: Credentials set as public are visible for all organizational structures

OrganizationalStructure.description:
The organizational structure of credential. Is required when IsCredentialPublic property
is set false

IsEquipmentSupervisor.description: Set if credential is able to be supervisor of equipments

AccessProfile.description:
The Access Profile of a Credential. Required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential

CanReentry.description:
Indecates if the Credential can get access to same direction more than once.
Required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.
If not informed, false is assumed.

DispensesPassword.description:
Allow the Credential get access without passaword, even passoword is required.
Required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.
If not informed, false is assumed.

PercentageOfSortition.description:
The percentage of sortition.
Required only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.
If not informed, 0 is assumed.

Password.description:
The Credential Password in Base64 encoded. The maximum size is 6(8 in base64).
Only for CredentialType property is set for
Credential that authenticates on Credential.

LockCredentialAfterAccessComplete.description: If lock credential after access complete

RemoteNumber.description: Gets or sets the remote number.

SerialNumber.description: Gets or sets the serial number.

GroupAreas.description: An array of group area association

HasDestinationArea.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this instance has destination area.

EquipmentGroupDescription.description: Gets or sets the equipment group description.

IsOriginArea.description: Is origin area (true) or destination area (false)

Number.description: The number that indentify an area

RegardsGroupArea.description: Regards the access profile of person (true) or change groups and areas (false)

People.description: Array of people on this authorization

CredentialNumberForFaceUse.description: Credential used for access face logs (Only GET. To set this value see PersonCredential resource)
